label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a different colored present initially. Let me list their starting gifts again to keep track. - Alice: green present - Bob: white present - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go step by step. Maybe making a table would help, but since I'm just thinking through, I'll track each person's gift after each swap. First swap: Bob and Alice swap their gifts. After first swap: - Alice now has Bob's original gift, which is white present. - Bob now has Alice's original gift, which is green present. Others remain the same: Claire has black, Dave has orange, Eve has yellow. Second swap: Alice and Eve swap their gifts. So Alice currently has white, Eve has yellow. After this swap: - Alice gets Eve's yellow present. - Eve gets Alice's white present. Bob still has green, Claire black, Dave orange. Third swap: Claire and Eve swap their gifts. Claire has black ball, Eve has white present (from the previous swap). After swapping: - Claire gets white present. - Eve gets black ball. So now: - Alice: yellow - Bob: green
